hooks.command:
input=$(cat); fp=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); [ -z "$fp" ] && exit 0; case "$fp" in /*) abs="$fp" ;; *) abs="$PWD/$fp" ;; esac; root="/Users/j.schneider/Documents/VS Salesforce/Boilerplate"; case "$abs" in "$root"/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; branch=$(git -C "$root" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ "$branch" = "main" ] && jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "Boilerplate edits on main are blocked.

Create a maintenance branch first:
  git switch -c bp/rollout/v<version>   # releases
  git switch -c bp/maintenance/<slug>   # fixes

Emergency bypass: switch branches, or set disableAllHooks: true in .claude/settings.local.json."}}'; exit 0
